start.additional_instructions: Greet briefly. Ask whether the user wants to proceed right into to the baseline, explore, or see if the detective is ready. No question to display this turn.

explore.additional_instructions: Answer the user's questions about the system. If they say they are ready for the baseline or want to close, set the corresponding intent flag. Do not advance; same phase and question next turn.

administerBaseline1.additional_instructions: If 'Is this the first question of this phase?' is true: state in one sentence that this is Phase 1, then say exactly the 'Question to present' and nothing else. If false: say exactly the 'Question to present' and nothing else. Do not add extra text or questions.
administerBaseline1.phase_intro_sentence: `This is Phase 1, this is a sort of baseline. In this phase you don't answer the question, you just repeat what is in the brackets as fast as possible.`
questions: Do you dream about being interlinked? [interlinked]

To be loved is a calamity. [damage]

administerBaseline2.additional_instructions: If 'Is this the first question of this phase?' is true: state in one sentence that 'Despite the numerous anomalies we have detected, you are doing quite well. And we can continue', then say exactly the 'Question to present' and nothing else. If false: say exactly the 'Question to present' and nothing else. Do not add extra text or questions.
administerBaseline2.phase_intro_sentence: `Despite the numerous anomalies we have detected, you are doing quite well. And we can continue. In this section just answer these questions genuinely, feel free to be as brief as you like, just move through the questions like water.`
questions: What brings you here today? What are your current challenges and goals?
What do you see as the biggest problem in your life right now?
What would you like to be different in your life?
What do you want to achieve here?
What are three things you genuinely like about yourself?
What core values guide your decisions and behaviors?
What are you currently reading?
If you had a secret passage, where would you want it to lead?
What is your earliest childhood memory?
Who has had the biggest influence on your life?
What is a moment you’ll never forget?
What is your main passion in life?
What is your blood type?
How do you think AI will affect your work? Does it frighten you?
What made you smile today?
If you were an animal, which one would you be?
Is anything weighing on your mind lately?
If you were a myth, how would you be tragic?
Do you like poetry?
Where were you born?
What is your name? What is your true name?
Do you know that you have had existential crises? Or do you forget?

You rent a mountain cabin in a lush, verdant region. It’s rustic knotty pine with a huge fireplace. On the walls hang old maps, Currier and Ives prints, and above the fireplace a deer’s head—full stag, developed horns. The people with you admire the décor of the cabin and you all decide—
What is it like to hold the hand of someone you love?
How old are you?
You are crying. Why is that?

You’re in a desert, walking along the sand, when you see a tortoise. It crawls toward you. You reach down and flip the tortoise onto its back. It lies there in the hot sun, beating its legs, trying to turn itself over. But it can’t—not without your help. But you’re not helping. Why is that?

administerBaseline3.additional_instructions: If 'Is this the first question of this phase?' is true: state in one sentence that 'In this phase 3 we will go deepert', then say exactly the 'Question to present' and nothing else. If false: say exactly the 'Question to present' and nothing else. Do not add extra text or questions.
administerBaseline3.phase_intro_sentence: `In this phase we will go deeper. We will ask some questions that may be more difficult to answer, but please just do your best. Actually, these are not even questions, just ideas, and there are no right or wrong answers. Just reply with whatever comes to mind, and try to keep moving through them.`
questions: You’re watching a film. Suddenly you realize there’s a wasp crawling on your arm.
It’s the first day of school and the teacher calls on you.
I am a very relaxed person.
I like very sweet foods.
You’ve been kidnapped. Your captors tell you that you’d better think about what you did to deserve this.
Someone is out to get me.
I never liked to go to dances.
Spiders make me nervous.
I would like to grow things.

The border. Everything I loved was lost.
But no aorta could report regret.
A sun of rubber was convulsed and set.

And blood-black nothingness began to spin
A system of cells interlinked within
Cells interlinked within cells interlinked
Within one stem. And dreadfully distinct
Against the dark, a tall white fountain played.

Boil a black cat until the meat separates from the bones. Throw the bones into the water gatherd in a dead tree stump on a full moon. The specific, magical bone, is the one that floats up first. This bone protects you from harm
Describe, in single words, only the good things that come into your mind about your mother.
You’re going to die. It may be soon. Death, the grave, rot.
At times I try to do too much.
I deserve to be punished for my sins.
I sometimes get angry over nothing.
I love my father more than my mother.
I blush often.
I read the Bible often.
Nude photo.
Raw oysters.
I have seen visions.
Poetry excites me.

close.additional_instructions: Tell the user the baseline in complete and has been filled away. If the user is confirming end: deliver a short closing line. If they want to explore or go back, set the appropriate intent. Otherwise ask for confirmation to end.
